name: Tree
searchText: tree display a tree structure @mantine/core /core/tree allowrangeselection checkonspace clearselectiononoutsideclick data expandonclick expandonspace keepmounted leveloffset rendernode selectonclick tree

props.name: allowRangeSelection
props.description: If set, tree nodes range can be selected with click when Shift key is pressed

props.name: checkOnSpace
props.description: If set, tree node is checked on space key press

props.name: clearSelectionOnOutsideClick
props.description: If set, selection is cleared when user clicks outside of the tree

props.name: expandOnClick
props.description: If set, tree node with children is expanded on click

props.name: expandOnSpace
props.description: If set, tree node with children is expanded on space key press

props.name: keepMounted
props.description: If set, subtree content is kept mounted when collapsed. React 19 Activity is used to preserve state.

props.name: levelOffset
props.description: Horizontal padding of each subtree level, key of theme.spacing or any valid CSS value

props.name: renderNode
props.description: A function to render tree node label

props.name: selectOnClick
props.description: If set, tree node is selected on click

props.name: tree
props.description: Use-tree hook instance that can be used to manipulate component state
